JavaScript test scripts for multiplication, division, and modulus operations with various data types.

## Folders
- **[11.05.01](11.05.01/README.md)**: JavaScript multiplication test scripts for various data types and edge cases.
- **[11.05.02](11.05.02/README.md)**: Test scripts for verifying various division operations and behaviors in JavaScript.
- **[11.05.03](11.05.03/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for various modulus operation scenarios, including NaN, Infinity, zero, and object types.
